channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Trump orders new strikes on Iran over attacks on shipping in Hormuz
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: US President Donald Trump ordered new strikes on Iran on Wednesday and warned of "much worse" if Tehran continues to attack vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, the vital oil shipping channel. The post Trump orders new strikes on Iran over attacks on shipping in Hormuz appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Drug Party: NDLEA Appeals Pretty Mike’s Acquittal
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) has urged the Lagos Division of the Court of Appeal to nullify the acquittal of Lagos socialite and nightclub owner, Mike Nwalie, popularly known as Pretty Mike, over alleged drug-related offences. Justice Ambrose Lewis-Allagoa had discharged Nwalie,

item.title: Gold Holds Decline as US Strikes on Iran Magnify Inflation Risks
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Gold held a decline as a second day of US strikes against Iran drove energy prices higher and intensified concerns around inflation.

item.title: Reps Urge Collaboration To End Human Trafficking
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: …As Group Seeks Approval To Rescue Trafficked Nigerians The Chairman of the House of Representatives Committee on Humanitarian Services, Hon. Tolulope Akande-Sadipe, has said tackling human trafficking requires both legislation and collaboration among government institutions, the private sector and

item.title: The Olukoyede Era: Repositioning EFCC For Prevention, Recovery, Global Credibility
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: …As US Consulate, FBI Applaud Chairman’s Strategic Leadership Since he was appointed Chairman of the Economic and Financial Crimes Commission, Mr Ola Olukoyede has shifted the EFCC from a reactive enforcement body to a proactive institution built on three pillars: prevention, large-scale asset recov

item.title: I started retirement with $3 million. Now I’m 89 and down to $2 million. What if I get sick?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Even if you’re not worried about your normal spending anymore, a long-term-care need is still a problem for any budget.

item.title: Fake Drugs: Senate Backs 15-Year Jail Term, Asset Forfeiture For Offenders
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Senate on Wednesday advanced moves to strengthen Nigeria’s fight against counterfeit medicines and unsafe food products, approving for second reading a bill proposing tougher penalties, asset forfeiture and stronger enforcement measures against offenders. The proposed Counterfeit Medical Product

item.title: ESSO Commits Over $300m To Boost Nigeria’s Deepwater Output By 40,000 Barrels Daily
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: …says investment’ll unlock around 40,000 bd of new deepwater oil production. …Usan infill project to generate $1.2bn for Nigeria Nigeria’s drive to ramp up crude oil production has received a major boost as ESSO Exploration and Production Nigeria Offshore East Limited announ

item.title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.

item.title: Tinubu Rejects Raw Materials Council, Chartered Institute Of Purchasing Bills
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has declined assent to the Chartered Institute of Purchasing and Supply Management of Nigeria (Establishment) Amendment Bill, 2026, and the Raw Materials Research and Development Council (Amendment) Bill, 2026, citing legal, structural and drafting defects. The president’s deci

item.title: Meta is reportedly working on smart glasses that would be recording all the time
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Meta might be the next company to make an always-on AI wearable. The company is working on prototype "super sensing" always-aware smart glasses that could continuously record audio and snap photos "every few seconds," according to the Financial Times. The wearer could then ask Meta AI about the capt

item.title: Justin Bieber joins FIFA World Cup 2026 final halftime show
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Through its Unite for Education campaign, FIFA is also using the World Cup to raise awareness about education projects. Players wore special Unite for Education sleeve patches during

item.title: Chris Sutton's World Cup quarter-final predictions
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the quarter-final ties at the 2026 World Cup, including England against Norway.

item.title: Disability Forum Urges Tinubu To End Arrest Of PWDs
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Society for People with Disability Forum has called on President Bola Tinubu to direct security agencies and other government authorities to immediately end the arrest, detention and alleged extortion of persons with disabilities (PWDs) across the country. The appeal was contained in an open let

item.title: 2027: City Boy Movement Will Deliver ‘Maximum Victory’ For Tinubu – Akpabio
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: President of the Senate, Godswill Akpabio, has said the City Boy Movement is poised to ensure “maximum victory” for the re-election of President Bola Tinubu in 2027. Akpabio stated this on Wednesday while receiving a delegation of the group led by its Director-General, Francis Shoga, on

item.title: Samsung, SK Hynix and Leveraged ETFs Drive 70% of Korea Trading
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Retail fervor over leveraged ETFs in South Korea has grown so intense that the products, together with the two chipmaker stocks they track, now make up more than 70% of trading value in the $4.3 trillion market.

item.title: Reps Urge FG To End Ransom Cash Economy
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The House of Representatives had urged President Bola Tinubu to establish a coordinated inter–agency framework to disrupt ransom financing and strengthen financial intelligence collaboration among relevant security, regulatory, and financial institutions. It also urged the federal government to stre

item.title: Justin Bieber joins Madonna, Shakira, BTS in World Cup final halftime show
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: FIFA expects 'a couple of billion' to tune in to the 11-minute performance, the first at a World Cup.

item.title: Senate Rejects Motion To Probe PFIPC Scandal, Awaits ICPC Report
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: …Senate has duty to probe N1.3bn PFIPC budget, Says Kawu The Senate, on Wednesday, rejected a motion seeking an immediate investigation into the controversy surrounding the Presidential Foreign Intervention Promotion Council (PFIPC) for which N1.3 billion was appropriated in the 2026 budget. S

item.title: Noteholders to Aston Martin Sign Cooperation Pact Amid Debt Rout
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: A group of creditors to luxury car maker Aston Martin has signed a cooperation pact as earnings pressure weighs on the company’s debt.

item.title: NUPRC Hands Over 19 Petroleum Prospecting Licences To Winners Of 2024 Licensing Round
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Nigerian Upstream Petroleum Regulatory Commission (NUPRC) has formally executed concession contracts and commenced the issuance of Petroleum Prospecting Licences (PPLs) to successful bidders in the 2024 Licensing Round, marking a major step towards unlocking fresh investments in Nigeria’s

item.title: Zulum announces N500m cash support for vulnerable residents in five Borno LGAs
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The governor said the intervention would benefit vulnerable persons, women and youths in Biu, Hawul, Kwaya Kusar, Bayo and Shani Local Government Areas to improve livelihoods and stimulate economic activities. The post Zulum announces N500m cash support for vulnerable residents in five Borno LGAs ap

item.title: NSCDC Deploys 1,300 Personnel To Secure Edo LG Election
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Edo State Command of the Nigeria Security and Civil Defence Corps (NSDC), has deployed 1,300 personnel across the three senatorial districts ahead of the forthcoming local government election slated for this Saturday, July 11, 2026 in the state. This was disclosed in a statement issued by the sp

item.title: Tinubu, Sanwo-Olu Charge CSOs, CBOs To Embrace Patriotism, Partnership For National Devt
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: President Bola Tinubu and the Governor of Lagos State, Mr Babajide Sanwo-Olu, have called for patriotism, accountability and inclusive partnerships to accelerate Nigeria’s sustainable development. This was as they both stressed the need for stronger collaboration between the government and civil soc

item.title: Harley-Davidson’s Credit Ratings Get Cut to Junk By S&P
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: S&P Global Ratings cut Harley-Davidson Inc.’s credit grades to junk status on Wednesday, citing the company’s strategy to start selling lower-cost motorcycles to boost revenue.

item.title: SK Hynix US Offering Is More Than Seven Times Oversubscribed
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: SK Hynix Inc.’s US listing is more than seven times oversubscribed, according to people familiar with the matter, as the South Korean memory chipmaker prepares to price its offering Thursday.

item.title: BellaNaija Next Gen Creator House Brought Young Creators Together to Learn, Build & Create With Google Gemini
item.dc:creator: BellaNaija
item.description: BellaNaija hosted the Next Gen Creator House, a full-day immersive workshop for Nigerian creators aged 18 to 25, in partnership with Google Gemini in Lagos on 25 June 2026, featuring industry experts including Toke Makinwa, Korty EO, Enioluwa Adeoluwa, and Tosin Ajibade. The post BellaNaija Next Gen

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The All Africa Association for Small and Medium Enterprises (AAASME) has inaugurated its Continental Advisory Council, with The post AAASME inaugurates Continental Advisory Council appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Oil Gains, US Stock Futures Drop on New Strikes: Markets Wrap
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Oil gained and US equity futures ticked lower after the US said it is striking Iran for the second straight day, an escalation of violence that threatens to choke shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: I did nails, sold bed space, cakes to survive at UNILAG – Funke Akindele
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Ace Nollywood producer, Funke Akindele has shared details of the numerous jobs she did to support herself as a student at the University of Lagos, including a painful experience when a dissatisfied customer slapped her over a nail job. The post I did nails, sold bed space, cakes to survive at UNILAG

item.description: Egypt’s Football Association has lodged a formal complaint with FIFA following the Pharaohs’ controversial FIFA 2026 World Cup Round of read more World Cup: Egypt demands FIFA probe after controversial Argentina defeat

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The International Organization for Migration (IOM), the federal government and development partners have called for increased investment in migration governance to promote safe, orderly and regular migration while tackling irregular migration and human trafficking. The call was made at the COMPASS@5

item.title: Obi Playing Victim With False Intimidation Claims — Presidency
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Presidency on Wednesday dismissed allegations by the Nigeria Democratic Congress presidential candidate, Peter Obi, that he is being targeted by the Federal Government, describing the claims as false and an attempt to portray himself as a victim. In a statement titled “Peter Obi’s Ne

item.title: Oil Extends Surge as Fresh US Strikes Against Iran Rattle Market
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Oil extended a powerful surge as the US struck targets in Iran for a second day, raising risks for energy supplies from the region.

item.title: UK launches manhunt for father accused of killing wife, two daughters
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: British police have launched an international manhunt for a father suspected of killing his wife and two daughters before fleeing to Zimbabwe. The post UK launches manhunt for father accused of killing wife, two daughters appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph

item.title: Fery plans to use home crowd against Zverev in semi-final
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Britain's Arthur Fery says he will use the crowd to "my advantage" against Germany's Alexander Zverev in their Wimbledon semi-final on Friday.

item.title: Trump Says Ukraine Can Make Patriot Missiles
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: American Enterprise Institute Senior Fellow Angela Stent discusses President Trump's announcement he would allow Ukraine to make its own Patriot Missiles. She says Trump "sees that Ukraine looks like a winner, that it has cards that the Ukrainians are really fighting back." (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Abia Denies Favoritism Allegations In Ogbo Smart School Admissions
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Abia State Government has dismissed allegations of favouritism in the admission of pupils into the newly commissioned Ogbo Central Smart School, Ubakala, insisting that the process was transparent and that all pupils originally enrolled in the school retained their places. Addressing journalists

item.title: 3 England players miss training ahead of Norway World Cup clash
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Three England players were absent from training on Wednesday ahead of Saturday's 2026 FIFA World Cup quarter-final against Norway. The post 3 England players miss training ahead of Norway World Cup clash appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets

item.title: England fan who used life savings to take grandad to World Cup gets refunded
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: An England supporter who gave up his house deposit to take his grandfather to the 2026 FIFA World Cup has received an unexpected financial boost after a company reimbursed the entire £10,000 he spent on the once-in-a-lifetime trip. item.title: Trump announces historic removal of Syria from US sanctions list
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The latest decision is expected to open new economic opportunities for Syrian businesses and citizens while supporting the country's efforts to reconnect with the global financial system.

item.description: Hannah Dugan's sentence comes after she helped an immigrant in the US avoid ICE agents waiting to arrest him in 2025.

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The indigenes, including a huge crowd of PDP faithful in Yewa, said that they would rather wait for the right time to support what they called “a true Yewa indigene for governorship of the state.” The post 2027: Ogun West indigenes endorse Adebutu’s governorship bid appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Oil prices settled at their highest levels in more than two weeks on Wednesday, then extended their gains in after-hours trading after the U.S. military said it launched additional strikes on Iran.

item.description: Egypt has filed a formal FIFA complaint after its controversial World Cup exit against Argentina, accusing officials of “double standards” and demanding the removal of the referee and his team. item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The governorship candidate of the African Action Congress, AAC, in the forthcoming Osun State governorship election, Olajide Esan, has called for sweeping reforms to Nigeria’s political system, saying the current structure discourages competent citizens from seeking public office. Esan made th

item.title: Investors haven’t been this bullish on the dollar in a decade. How the buck can keep climbing.
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: A crowded bet on a stronger U.S. dollar may depend on whether Wednesday’s jump in oil prices proves lasting, as renewed Middle East tensions revive inflation concerns and bolster expectations that the Federal Reserve may need to keep policy tight.

item.title: Dollar to Naira Exchange Rate Today, July 78, 2026: Nigerian Naira extends depreciation
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Naira extended its depreciation against the dollar on Wednesday at the official foreign exchange market. Central Bank of Nigeria’s data showed that the Naira dropped to N1,379.07 per dollar on Wednesday, down from N1,375.75 traded on Tuesday. This means that on a day-to-day basis, the Nige

item.title: Trader Joe's, Lowe's Embrace Mini Mania To Boost Sales
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Mini mania is sweeping through US retailers as shoppers on a budget love colorful, charming, tiny versions of common products. Bloomberg’s Sunny Kim has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: ‘Obi inventing stories to attract undue sympathy’ – Presidency
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Presidency has dismissed allegations by former Anambra State governor and Labour Party presidential candidate, Peter Obi, that he is being targeted by the Federal Government, describing the claims as false and misleading. The post ‘Obi inventing stories to attract undue sympathy’ &#8

item.title: Rashford dilemma for Man Utd - Thursday's gossip
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Manchester United are in a quandary over Marcus Rashford's future, Arsenal and Tottenham eye Antonio Nusa, Barcelona shortlist Bournemouth's Eli Junior Kroupi, plus more.

item.title: Transfer: Nigerian defender seals move to FK Austria Wien
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Austrian Bundesliga club FK Austria Wien have completed the signing of Nigerian defender Ibrahim Buhari, DAILY POST reports. The Violets signed Buhari from Swedish first division side IF Elfsborg. Buhari put pen to paper on a three-year contract with the 24-time Bundesliga champions. The 24-year-old

item.title: Army troops intercept woman, child allegedly heading to terrorist enclave in Borno
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Troops of the 26 Task Force Brigade under Operation HADIN KAI have intercepted a 20-year-old woman and her two-year-old child while she was allegedly attempting to make her way into a terrorist-held enclave near the Mandara Mountains in Borno State. This was made know by a security expert, Zagazola

item.title: Tinubu seeks Reps’ approval of bill seeking to strengthen secondary school education
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The House of Representatives on Wednesday received President Bola Tinubu's bill seeking to strengthen the administration and governance of... The post Tinubu seeks Reps’ approval of bill seeking to strengthen secondary school education appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Sokoto Distributes 62 Armoured Vehicles To Strengthen Security Operations
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The vehicles, which include Armoured Personnel Carriers and hundreds of motorcycles, will be deployed to various security agencies to enhance mobility and improve rapid response to security threats. The post Sokoto Distributes 62 Armoured Vehicles To Strengthen Security Operations appeared first on

item.title: Former rebel turned government ally proposes a path to peace for Sudan
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Malik Agar Ayyir has proposed a national dialogue to end the civil war and steer Sudan towards democratic civilian rule.
